hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The key is to accumulate the sounds as you work through the if statements - don't return straight away

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start with an empty string and build up the result

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use concatenate() to add each sound to the result

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: If the result is still empty after checking all three divisors, convert the number to a string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: This exercise should only have one or two return statements
